subcodes.first_line: O Ahmad! Hearken unto the Voice that calleth thee from this Prison which hath been raised behind a thousand mountains [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا احمد اسمع ندآء من ینادیک فی هذا السجن الذی کان خلف الف جبل مرفوعا و لن
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @consolation and comfort, @rejection, opposition and persecution
